overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of Jig-Jig Street in Cyberpunk 2077's Night City, showcasing a neon-lit cyberpunk red-light district with holographic advertisements, street vendors, and futuristic architecture mixed with traditional Asian elements. The footage features wet reflective streets, red paper lanterns, and dense urban atmosphere with various NPCs populating the area.

events.description: passing under the Jig-Jig Street archway into the covered neon-lit street

agents.ego_description: walking toward the Jig-Jig Street entrance, looking up at the towering cyberpunk buildings and neon signage

entered.detail: large cursive neon sign reading 'Bliss' on the building facade
traditional Asian-style archway entrance with 'JIG-JIG STREET' in pink neon letters
massive futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows towering above the street
traditional red Chinese lanterns hanging in rows across the street entrance

segments.scene_description: The clip opens at a cyberpunk intersection with wet reflective pavement, approaching the entrance to Jig-Jig Street. The camera moves toward a traditional Asian archway adorned with pink neon lettering and red paper lanterns, passing under the structure to enter the covered commercial street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian street lined with neon storefronts and red lanterns

events.description: slowing pace to observe storefronts on the left side of the covered street

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered street, observing the neon-lit storefronts and traditional red lanterns hanging overhead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near a doorway, observing the street activity

entered.detail: large oval-shaped window showing the interior of a club with pink neon lighting
red neon sign with Asian characters and 'JOY' visible on the right wall

segments.scene_description: Walking through the covered Jig-Jig Street with wet reflective pavement and rows of red paper lanterns overhead. The camera passes various neon storefronts and slows to observe a club with a distinctive oval window on the left, while pedestrians walk in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: club exterior with performance window and narrow service alley

events.description: stopping to look at the dancer visible through the oval club window
turning right into a narrow side alley with greenish lighting

agents.ego_description: pausing to observe the dancer through the club window, then turning into a narrow side alleyway

notable_agents.action: dancer performing inside the club, visible through the oval window with pink backlighting

entered.detail: digital advertisement display showing 'IT'S BURRITO BIG' with a food item image
tight corridor with metal shelving and debris on the sides, leading deeper into the district

segments.scene_description: The camera stops to observe a dancer performing inside a club through a large oval window illuminated with pink neon. After a moment, the perspective turns right into a narrow alleyway, passing a holographic advertisement for a burrito and entering a more confined corridor with greenish ambient lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with holographic projections and street vendors

events.description: passing holographic dancers projected on the left wall storefront windows

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alley, passing holographic advertisements and projected dancers on the walls

notable_agents.action: woman standing against the wall looking at a holographic display

entered.detail: life-sized holographic images of dancers projected in storefront windows with pink and blue lighting
overhead neon light strips in blue and orange illuminating the corridor ahead

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrow back alley lined with holographic dancer projections in pink and blue neon. The camera passes a woman observing the displays and continues toward a wider area with overhead neon light strips, transitioning from the confined corridor back toward the main commercial area.

scene_state.functional_zone: food vendor area with service counter and neon ceiling installation

events.description: slowing down to observe the food counter and NPCs seated there

agents.ego_description: exploring the food vendor area, observing NPCs seated at the counter and the surrounding neon-lit environment

notable_agents.action: person with bright green hair sitting at the food counter, eating and drinking

entered.detail: street food vendor counter with stools, plates of food, and condiments on the surface
large wall mural featuring a stylized skull with graffiti art style behind the food counter

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a bustling food vendor area with a long counter where NPCs sit on stools eating. A prominent skull mural covers the wall behind the counter, while colorful neon light strips curve overhead. The camera moves slowly past the food preparation area, observing the detailed cyberpunk street life before the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide cyberpunk intersection into the dense, neon-soaked corridors of Jig-Jig Street and its hidden back alleys. It begins by approaching a traditional Asian archway adorned with pink neon and red lanterns, passing beneath the structure to enter a covered commercial street with wet, reflective pavement. As the camera glides past glowing storefronts, it slows to observe a dancer through a pink-lit oval club window before turning right into a narrow alleyway marked by a holographic burrito advertisement and greenish ambient light. The scene then shifts through a confined corridor lined with pink and blue holographic dancer projections, eventually opening back up into a wider area beneath curving neon light strips. Finally, the movement leads into a bustling food vendor area, passing a prominent skull mural and patrons on stools to showcase the detailed street life of the district.
